_meta.description: This file contains the data for the welcome section of the freelance mode of the portfolio website. It includes a brief tagline focused on client-facing value, a summary of professional identity from a freelance perspective, and the call-to-action (CTA) button which links to a WhatsApp conversation.

fields.brief: A short, impactful rotating set of taglines communicating the freelance value proposition to potential clients.
fields.summary: A concise summary of the owner's freelance identity — what they build, for whom, and what makes them different from a typical developer.
fields.ctaText: The text displayed on the primary call-to-action button.
fields.ctaLink: The URL the CTA button redirects to — a WhatsApp link for direct client contact.

welcome.brief: I guide and build tech for people's vision.
welcome.summary: A software engineer, extremely proficient in understanding your needs and advising on the most suitable path to choose, both financially and long-term, rather than just building something.
